specialist_assignments.rationale: Legal Analyst covers both lease drafting (Deep) and compliance checklist (Light) via domain_tags: legal, contracts, compliance, regulatory, lease, landlord-tenant.
Financial Analyst handles rental market analysis (Standard) and expense tracking (Light) via domain_tags: financial, analysis, modeling, pricing, expenses, spreadsheets.

execution_order.rationale: Task 1 (lease) and Task 4 (compliance) have no dependencies; Task 2 (market analysis) has no dependencies. Execute in parallel.
Task 5 (expense tracker) depends on Task 2 (rental analysis) completion. Same-specialist sequencing.

unmatched_tasks.title: Create Property Listing Copy
unmatched_tasks.reason: No specialist available with marketing or copy-writing domain_tags. Available specialists cover: legal, financial, technical documentation, and database architecture.
